failureCodeMessages.endUserMessage: Your attempt was approved partially due to insufficient balance.
failureCodeMessages.description: The customer's bank approved the transaction partially due to insufficient balance

failureCodeMessages.endUserMessage: Your bank approved the transaction partially due to insufficient balance.
